headline: Pfizer Reaches Three Settlement Agreements for VYNDAMAX
summary: NEW YORK, April 28, 2026--Pfizer Inc. (NYSE: PFE) today announced that it has entered into settlement agreements with generic drug manufacturers Dexcel Pharma, Hikma Pharmaceuticals and Cipla Ltd, regarding lawsuits filed in the U.S. District Court for the District of Delaware for infringement of patents relating to VYNDAMAX® (tafamidis), a treatment for cardiomyopathy transthyretin-mediated amyloidosis (ATTR-CM).
